response:
```python
import pytest

from your_module import title_case


@pytest.mark.parametrize(
    "input_str, expected",
    [
        ("hello world", "Hello World"),
        ("HELLO WORLD", "Hello World"),
        ("hElLo wOrLd", "Hello World"),
        ("python", "Python"),
        ("multiple   spaces here", "Multiple Spaces Here"),
        (" leading and trailing ", "Leading And Trailing"),
        ("mixed\twhitespace\nworks", "Mixed Whitespace Works"),
        ("a", "A"),
        ("a b c", "A B C"),
    ],
)
def test_title_case_happy_path(input_str, expected):
    assert title_case(input_str) == expected


@pytest.mark.parametrize(
    "input_str, expected",
    [
        ("", ""),
        ("   ", ""),
        ("\t\n", ""),
        ("  hello   ", "Hello"),
        ("  hello   world  ", "Hello World"),
    ],
)
def test_title_case_edge_cases(input_str, expected):
    assert title_case(input_str) == expected


@pytest.mark.parametrize(
    "bad_input",
    [
        None,
        123,
        12.5,
        ["hello world"],
        {"text": "hello world"},
        ("hello", "world"),
        b"hello world",
    ],
)
def test_title_case_error_cases(bad_input):
    with pytest.raises(AttributeError):
        title_case(bad_input)
```
